_publications._publicationTitle: Interpreting mammalian target of rapamycin and cell growth inhibition in a genetically engineered mouse model of Nf1-deficient astrocytes.

_contextSnippet: Using LC/LC-MS/MS assay methods, we found dose-dependent increases in rapamycin concentrations in blood ( Fig. 1A ) and brain tissue ( Fig. 1B )
resourceName: LC/LC-MS/MS system (HPLC Agilent 1100 Series, Applied Biosystems/Sciex API 4000)
details: Successfully measured dose-dependent increases in rapamycin concentrations in both blood and brain tissue, demonstrating exponential correlation between brain and blood levels
